one_time_description: Treaty loan of $9,072,929 forgiven by Government of Canada effective March 31, 2020
economic_notes: Nation operates Kwagis Power LP (25% interest, 41.5MW run-of-river hydro), Orca Sand & Gravel LP (12% interest), Atli Resources LP (logging), Kuterra LP (land-based salmon aquaculture, ceased operations Feb 1 2020), Mama'omas LP (fishing licences), Danyas Forest Products LP (49.5% interest), Namgis Economic Development Corp. Gas station and tobacco outlet also operated.
notes: Large one-time item: $9,072,929 treaty loan forgiven by Government of Canada effective March 31, 2020, significantly inflating surplus. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $15,300,144 + FNHA $4,217,313 + Province of BC $3,008,650 + Fisheries & Oceans $2,765,171 + Other Federal Grants $1,755,660 + FNESS $578,371 + Other grants $500,000 + NVIATS $121,069 + CMHC $26,784 + Municipal services $106,283 = $28,379,445; however share of enterprise income ($3,062,350) is equity method income not a government transfer; OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government-sourced transfers. 11 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries. Auditor name appears as McIntosh Norton Williams chartered professional accountants. Segmented expenses for Natural Resources $1,701,325 and Commercial Enterprises not fully captured in program expense fields above. expenses_infrastructure set to 0 as no distinct infrastructure segment reported separately.
